hooks.command: echo 'DRUPAL WORKFLOW PLUGIN ACTIVE | Start: /drupal-bootstrap | Prime: /drupal-prime | Status: /drupal-status | Semantic: /drupal-semantic | Test: /drupal-test | Verify: /drupal-verify'

PROJECT_DIR="${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-$(pwd)}"; TIMESTAMP="$PROJECT_DIR/docs/semantic/structural/.generated-at"; if [ -f "$TIMESTAMP" ]; then STALE=$(find "$PROJECT_DIR" -newer "$TIMESTAMP" \( -name '*.services.yml' -o -name '*.routing.yml' -o -name '*.module' -o -name '*.permissions.yml' \) -path '*/modules/*' 2>/dev/null | head -1); if [ -n "$STALE" ]; then bash "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/skills/structural-index/scripts/generate-all.sh" "$PROJECT_DIR" >/dev/null 2>&1 && echo 'STRUCTURAL INDEX: Auto-regenerated (source files changed since last generation).'; fi; fi; exit 0
